form.formComment: Last start game effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 2130m after showing early pace at Gloucester Park, beaten 6 m by South Side Story (2:35.50) in 4yo+ NR 60 to 68 on March 31 at $21. Two runs back won by a nose as favourite (Sr3) at Pinjarra (2:04.40) beating Miss Uneek in 4yo+ 1-3 WINs M on March 23 at $2.20. Can continue the fine form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start game effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 2130m after showing early pace at Gloucester Park, beaten 6 m by South Side Story (2:35.50) in 4yo+ NR 60 to 68 on March 31 at $21. Two runs back won by a nose as favourite (Sr3) at Pinjarra (2:04.40) beating Miss Uneek in 4yo+ 1-3 WINs M on March 23 at $2.20. Can continue the fine form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung outwards in the front straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at this track over 2190m 4yo+ NR 56 to 68 on March 20. Last time out 9th (Fr5) over 2130m after showing early speed at Gloucester Park, beaten 11 m by Lil Happy Fella (2:36.50) in 4yo+ NR 60 to 72 on April 7 at $34. From a low draw expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 9th (Fr2) over 2130m at Gloucester Park beaten 17 m by Cee Dee Three (2:35.10) in 4yo+ 0W/17K stake on April 3 at $21. Before that was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr6) over 2130m at Gloucester Park, beaten 14 m by South Side Story (2:35.50) in 4yo+ NR 60 to 68 on March 31 at $81. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr1) over 2130m after showing early pace at Gloucester Park beaten 12 m by South Side Story (2:35.50) in 4yo+ NR 60 to 68 on March 31 at $4.60. Two runs back game effort when 3rd (Sr1) over 2536m at Gloucester Park, at the bell was 7th-8.9m 2WWC beaten 6 m by Arionrock (3:07.10) in 4yo+ NR up to 70 on November 7 at $15. Solid prospect with that run under the belt.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start 11th (Fr3) over 2185m after showing early speed at Pinjarra beaten 75 m by Soho Shakedown (2:36.20) in 4yo+ NR up to 80 on April 6 at $6. Before that, a solid effort when 3rd (Fr4) over 2185m after showing early speed at Pinjarra, beaten 12 m by Lazi Dais (2:37.50) in 4yo+ 0-1W/17 0K stake/12 Months on March 16 at $23. Rates highly and can do much better.

Rates highly and can do much better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and broke gait in the back straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Two back was fourth behind Lazi Dais at Bunbury over 2100m in a 4yo+ NR 70 to 80 on March 28 at $10. Then a handy effort when third behind Del Bocavista Bay at Wagin over 2590m in a 4yo+ NR up to 70 on April 2 at $4.40. Rates highly and likely to be prominent again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was fourth behind Lazi Dais at Bunbury over 2100m in a 4yo+ NR 70 to 80 on March 28 at $10. Then a handy effort when third behind Del Bocavista Bay at Wagin over 2590m in a 4yo+ NR up to 70 on April 2 at $4.40. Rates highly and likely to be prominent again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced bare in the hind legs.
Raced in restricted room over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Back in form at the last couple of outings, two starts back posted a big 10 m win as favourite (Sr3) at Gloucester Park (2:38.60) beating Jackie Daniels in 4yo+ NR 55 to 65 on March 13 at $3.30. Last start just missed, game effort despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr6) over 2130m at Gloucester Park beaten 3 m by A Little Silence (2:36.00) in 4yo+ NR 55 to 65 on March 27 at $17. Will be right in the thick of things.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, was well back in the run when 6th (Fr8) over 2130m at Gloucester Park beaten 25 m by Luvbite (2:33.90) in 4yo+ NR up to 70 on April 3 at $34. Before that 6th (Fr2) over 2130m after showing early speed at Gloucester Park, beaten 6 m by Bazaar Package (2:34.90) in 4yo+ NR 65 to 75 on March 27 at $16. Others make more appeal.
